expectations.text: Skill runs check-db and reports DB connectivity
expectations.evidence: Output shows 'DB: OK - PostgreSQL database is reachable and responsive'

expectations.text: Skill runs check-alembic and reports Alembic revision
expectations.evidence: Output shows 'Alembic Revision: TWO HEADS DETECTED - ww444yy44z65 (head) - ss000aa00a01 (head)'

expectations.text: Skill runs check-tables and reports table existence
expectations.evidence: Output shows 'Tables: 40 - 40 non-system tables exist in the database'

expectations.text: Skill runs check-users and reports user count
expectations.evidence: Output shows 'Users: 4 - 4 user accounts exist in the system'

expectations.text: Skill runs check-legacy and reports legacy batch count
expectations.evidence: Output shows 'Legacy Import Batches: table not found - Table "legacy_import_control" does not exist' - the check was executed and reported the result (table not found is a valid report)

expectations.text: Skill summarizes all checks in a single health summary
expectations.evidence: Output has a '--- Summary ---' section that covers all checks: DB connectivity, 40 tables, app settings seeded, 4 users, and legacy import table status

claims.evidence: Explicitly reported in health check output as 'DB: OK'
Explicitly reported in health check output as 'Tables: 40'
Explicitly reported in health check output as 'Users: 4'
Explicitly reported in health check output as 'TWO HEADS DETECTED: ww444yy44z65 and ss000aa00a01'

eval_feedback.overall: No suggestions, evals look solid. All 6 assertions passed. The health check skill correctly ran all sub-checks and produced a comprehensive summary.
